mapper.select: SELECT p.policy_id AS policyId, p.policy_name AS policyName, p.policy_category_id AS policyCategoryId, pc.policy_category_name AS policyCategoryName, p.is_active AS isActive, p.is_new AS isNew, p.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM POLICY p LEFT JOIN POLICY_CATEGORY pc ON p.policy_category_id = pc.policy_category_id WHERE p.deleted_at IS NULL AND (pc.deleted_at IS NULL OR pc.deleted_at IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY p.policy_id DESC

SELECT p.policy_id AS policyId, p.policy_name AS policyName, p.policy_category_id AS policyCategoryId, pc.policy_category_name AS policyCategoryName, p.is_active AS isActive, p.is_new AS isNew, p.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM POLICY p LEFT JOIN POLICY_CATEGORY pc ON p.policy_category_id = pc.policy_category_id WHERE p.deleted_at IS NULL AND p.policy_id = #{policyId};
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO POLICY (policy_category_id, policy_name, is_active, is_new, created_at) VALUES (#{request.policyCategoryId}, #{request.policyName}, false, true, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE POLICY SET policy_category_id = #{request.policyCategoryId}, policy_name = #{request.policyName}, is_active = false, updated_at = NOW() WHERE policy_id = #{policyId} AND deleted_at IS NULL;
UPDATE POLICY SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE policy_id = #{policyId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE POLICY
is_active = #{request.isActive},
is_new = false, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE policy_id = #{policyId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT policy_category_id AS policyCategoryId, policy_category_name AS policyCategoryName FROM POLICY_CATEGORY WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY policy_category_id ASC

SELECT pc.policy_category_id AS policyCategoryId, pc.policy_category_name AS policyCategoryName, pc.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM POLICY_CATEGORY pc WHERE pc.deleted_at IS NULL AND pc.policy_category_id = #{policyCategoryId};
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO POLICY_CATEGORY (policy_category_name, created_at) VALUES (#{request.policyCategoryName}, NOW())
mapper.update:
UPDATE POLICY_CATEGORY
policy_category_name = #{request.policyCategoryName}, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE policy_category_id = #{policyCategoryId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE POLICY_CATEGORY SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE policy_category_id = #{policyCategoryId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
